name: Birdsong (Day)
usage: Looping background bed; play very low under gameplay (see mix.category_gain_db.ambience).

ai.prompt: A gentle daytime woodland ambience: soft songbirds chirping and twittering at a distance, a faint warm breeze, calm and welcoming. Seamless, evenly-textured environmental ambience bed; immersive and continuous with no sudden one-off events; steady throughout so it loops cleanly; no music, no melody, no speech, no discernible words; natural field-recording quality.

mastering: peak-normalize(-1 dBFS) only (seamless loop — no trim/fades)
